name: Butter Sponge for French Pastry
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the eggs and sugar. Heat over hot water, beating constantly until warm (95°F).
2. Remove from heat and beat until cool and stiff.
3. Gradually add the sifted flour mixture (cornstarch, salt, and baking powder) to the egg mixture, mixing as lightly as possible.
4. Add lemon juice and grated lemon rind.
5. Slowly incorporate the melted butter while stirring constantly.
6. Pour the batter into a well-oiled pan.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for about 20 minutes.
8. Allow to cool before cutting into various shapes.
9. Ice with different colored icing and decorate with fancy designs of contrasting colors.
